pgxxx-p1-s2: These men were not drinking to escape; they were drinking to overcome a craving beyond their mental control.

pgxxx-p2-s1: There are many situations which arise out of the phenomenon of craving which cause men to make the supreme sacrifice rather than continue to fight.
pgxxx-p2: There are many situations which arise out of the phenomenon of craving which cause men to make the supreme sacrifice rather than continue to fight.
pgxxx-p3-s1: The classification of alcoholics seems most difficult, and in much detail is outside the scope of this book.
pgxxx-p3-s2: There are, of course, the psychopaths who are emotionally unstable.
pgxxx-p3-s3: We are all familiar with this type.
pgxxx-p3-s4: They are always " going on the wagon for keeps."
pgxxx-p3-s5: They are over-remorseful and make many resolutions, but never a decision.
pgxxx-p3: The classification of alcoholics seems most difficult, and in much detail is outside the scope of this book. There are, of course, the psychopaths who are emotionally unstable. We are all familiar with this type. They are always " going on the wagon for keeps." They are over-remorseful and make many resolutions, but never a decision.
pgxxx-p4-s1: There is the type of man who is unwilling to admit that he cannot take a drink.
pgxxx-p4-s2: He plans various ways of drinking.
pgxxx-p4-s3: He changes his brand or his environment.
pgxxx-p4-s4: There is the type who always believes that after being entirely free from alcohol for a period of time he can take a drink without danger.
pgxxx-p4-s5: There is the manic-depressive type, who is, perhaps, the least understood by his friends, and about whom a whole chapter could be written.
pgxxx-p4: There is the type of man who is unwilling to admit that he cannot take a drink. He plans various ways of drinking. He changes his brand or his environment. There is the type who always believes that after being entirely free from alcohol for a period of time he can take a drink without danger. There is the manic-depressive type, who is, perhaps, the least understood by his friends, and about whom a whole chapter could be written.
pgxxx-p5-s1: Then there are types entirely normal in every respect except in the effect alcohol has upon them.
pgxxx-p5-s2: They are often able, intelligent, friendly people.
pgxxx-p5: Then there are types entirely normal in every respect except in the effect alcohol has upon them. They are often able, intelligent, friendly people.
pgxxx-p6-s1: All these, and many others, have one symptom in common: they cannot start drinking without developing the phenomenon of craving.
pgxxx-p6-s2: This phenomenon, as we have suggested, may be the manifestation of an allergy which differentiates these people, and sets them apart as a distinct entity.
pgxxx-p6-s3: It has never been, by any treatment with which we are familiar, permanently eradicated.
pgxxx-p6-s4: The only relief we have to suggest is entire abstinence.
pgxxx-p6: All these, and many others, have one symptom in common: they cannot start drinking without developing the phenomenon of craving. This phenomenon, as we have suggested, may be the manifestation of an allergy which differentiates these people, and sets them apart as a distinct entity. It has never been, by any treatment with which we are familiar, permanently eradicated. The only relief we have to suggest is entire abstinence.
pgxxx-p7-s1: This immediately precipitates us into a seething caldron of debate.
pgxxx-p7-s2: Much has been written pro and con, but among physicians, the general opinion seems to be that most chronic alcoholics are doomed.
pgxxx-p7: This immediately precipitates us into a seething caldron of debate. Much has been written pro and con, but among physicians, the general opinion seems to be that most chronic alcoholics are doomed.
